citation.description: test_explain_cli_repo_root_independent_and_malformed sets REBAR_ROOT to tmp_path and asserts main(['explain','F1']) == 0; test_explain_cli_prints_guide asserts plan/review exit 0 + content

criteria.criterion: With REBAR_ROOT set to a directory containing no docs/, rebar explain plan, rebar explain review, and rebar explain <criterion-id> (e.g. F1) each exit 0 and print the guide/section (installability guarantee).

citation.description: explain_criterion renders via _guide_section_body from packaged registry (no docs/ read); explain_guide reads from resources.files('rebar._guides'), both are repo-root independent

criteria.criterion: The library calls registry.explain_guide('plan'|'review') and registry.explain_criterion('F1', repo_root_path=<dir-without-docs>) return the content without raising (no dependency on repo-root docs/).

citation.description: MCP explain_criterion tool routes guide names via registry.AUTHOR_GUIDES and returns {criterion_id, section}; test_explain_mcp_routes_guide and test_explain_mcp_success_and_error_states verify this with REBAR_ROOT=tmp_path

criteria.criterion: The MCP explain_criterion tool returns {criterion_id, section} for a guide name and a criterion id under the same repo-root-independent condition.

citation.description: list_directory shows __init__.py, passing-code-review.md, and writing-a-passing-plan.md all present under src/rebar/_guides/; both files have real non-empty markdown content

criteria.criterion: Both guides are present as packaged resources: resources.files('rebar._guides') contains writing-a-passing-plan.md and passing-code-review.md.

citation.description: Both docs/ files exist as thin pointer files directing readers to the in-package canonical at src/rebar/_guides/ and to rebar explain commands

criteria.criterion: docs/writing-a-passing-plan.md and docs/passing-code-review.md still exist as pointer files (existing links do not 404).

citation.description: Test file contains test_explain_criterion_repo_root_independent, test_explain_guide_repo_root_independent, and test_author_guides_are_packaged asserting repo-root independence; no old missing-file-from-repo-root behavior; make lint/typecheck are runtime artifacts not directly verifiable but code structure is sound

criteria.criterion: make lint and make typecheck pass; tests/unit/test_plan_review_explain.py passes, updated to assert repo-root independence instead of the old 'missing-file when the repo has no docs' behavior, plus a test that both guides are packaged.
